---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that is not working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Reproducible example

Please provide a minimal [reprex](https://reprex.tidyverse.org/) using only the
simulated `weightflow_example` dataset (do not include private data).

```r
library(weightflow)
data(weightflow_example)
# ...
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened, including any error or warning messages.

## Session info

<details>

```r
sessionInfo()
# or
sessioninfo::session_info()
```

</details>
